decoder_heading: What are my opt-out rights?

heading_content_part: What are my opt-out rights?You can stop all collection of information by theApplication easily by uninstalling the Application. You may use the standarduninstall processes as may be available as part of your mobile device or viathe mobile application marketplace or network. You can also request to opt-outvia email, atingenioxapps@gmail.com.
